title: genista umbellata subsp. equisetiformis
intro: Genista umbellata subsp. equisetiformis, also known as the spiny broom or Spanish gorse, is a plant species in the Fabaceae family, characterized by its thorny stems and bright yellow flowers. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic properties. Genista umbellata subsp. equisetiformis is believed to offer several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting digestive health. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, making it a versatile herbal remedy.
